# Lawenots

> Platform services, web design, and digital marketing from a lean team of developers and marketers — one roof.

## Primary pages

- https://www.lawenots.com/ — Company overview
- https://www.lawenots.com/services — Domains, hosting, databases, code audit, launch package
- https://www.lawenots.com/web — Custom websites, UI/UX, branding, CRO
- https://www.lawenots.com/marketing — SEO, paid ads, social media, email marketing
- https://www.lawenots.com/about — Team background and experience
- https://www.lawenots.com/contact — Project inquiries and quotes

## Contact

Use the form at https://www.lawenots.com/contact for new projects and support requests.
